name: A Map Without an Origin
description: Within the Erased Cities timeline: a survivor of a vanished city begins drawing the place from memory. The map starts working in reverse — pulling fragments of the lost city back into existence.

divergence_event.timeline_ref: Six months after the Lagos Fade
divergence_event.description: A former resident of the erased Lagos neighborhood, who alone retains its memory, begins to draw it on paper. The drawings start to manifest.

visual.style_adjustment: hand-drawn cartography, paper textures, warmth returning to color, organic line work

focus: the act of remembering as resistance
